name: Ashley Gold Corp.
description: Ashley Gold Corp. is a Canadian junior mineral exploration company focused on acquiring and developing gold and polymetallic deposits in Canada's top mining regions. The company holds multiple 100%-owned assets in the Dryden Area of Ontario, including the Tak Patents adjacent to NexGold Mining's Goliath Gold Complex, as well as the Gold Mountain polymetallic project in British Columbia. Ashley Gold is at the exploration stage, actively conducting diamond drilling programs and geophysical surveys across its Ontario and British Columbia properties.
